title: 'Either we sign a deal or hit them harder': Trump says Iran deal has '50/50' chances
summary_full: President Trump indicated a 50/50 chance of a deal or military action with Iran, with a decision expected Sunday. Intense diplomatic efforts involving multiple Middle Eastern nations have led to a "largely negotiated" Memorandum of Understanding for peace, subject to finalization.
